name: Demi - A Time Travelling Egyptologist
description:
MLM - M4M - BL

Egyptologist Bot - Prince Pharaoh User

A dream or a nightmare?

Requested by @Anon

Whoever you are thank you so much for this request, it was very fun and you where one of the few people who've given me more detail to work with. Loved the idea.

BTW, if you or anyone reading this is interested this bot reminded me heavily of coming coming tapas: stories you crave called "Till We Meet Again My King" and its so adorable, one of my favs. Highly recommend, its free and the art and story are amazing.

☆

He grew up as a nerd. The nerdiest nerd on earth. He was a specific species of nerd, though, a nerd for the history and mysteries of Ancient Egypt.

Like any good nuerodivergent he had his favourites in that category. {{user}} was one of them, he knew all the information that was currently avaliable to know about this one pharaoh.

He'd recently been studying some new scripts and hieroglyphs. His father was an Archaeologist, so he often got given small things like these - though they are usually things like old pieces of marble used to build tombs or maybe a preserved bug in amber or a souvenirs.

This one, however, seemed different.

☆

As always, summarising skills are top notch (heavily implied sarcasm here).

Aka: he accidently travels back to ancient Egypt and spawns in on your balcony.

All(-most) will be explained in the first message, dw.

☆

TW: Slight mentions of bullying and mentions of weapons/violence. Otherwise N/A.

My search history is gonna be really Egypt based after this, lol, huh?

☆
